source: arXiv API + SearXNG — monthly scan, July 2026
summary: July 2026: Agent security dominates the research agenda after April's frontier model escape. MCP now has dedicated defense taxonomies (MCP-DPT), secure protocol variants (SMCP), and formal security analyses. Reasoning-at-inference continues to deliver — DiffCoT (ACL 2026) and thinking-optimal scaling push the frontier. SLM benchmarking matures with SLMQuant. SWE-bench goes live with continuous evaluation. Startup market: Sierra hits $10B/$150M ARR, Decagon closes Series D at $4.5B, Runway leads video at $5.3B/$300M revenue.

trends.signal: Autonomous agents with tool use, planning, and memory are shipping to production. New 2026 papers: verifiable agent evaluation (AEMA), zero-trust security architectures for healthcare agents, anti-collusion mechanisms mapped from human domains. Multi-agent deception studied experimentally (Among Us, AAMAS 2026). Trustworthy agent survey catalogs new failure modes.
trends.learn: Agent architectures (plan-act-observe loops), tool-use protocols (MCP/A2A), multi-agent coordination patterns, agent safety and alignment frameworks, zero-trust containment
trends.build: Vertical AI workers for regulated industries. Agent evaluation platforms. Human-in-the-loop oversight. Secure agent sandboxes. Anti-collusion monitoring for agent fleets.

papers.title: Towards trustworthy agentic AI: comprehensive survey of safety, robustness, privacy
Deception and Communication in Autonomous Multi-Agent Systems: Among Us Study
AEMA: Verifiable Evaluation Framework for Trustworthy Agentic LLM Systems
Mapping Human Anti-collusion Mechanisms to Multi-agent AI Systems

market_validation.name: Sierra
market_validation.note: Founded by ex-Salesforce CEO. $150M ARR. Valuation jumped to $10B (Oct 2025).

market_validation.name: Decagon
market_validation.note: Series D Jan 2026. 3x valuation growth in 9 months.

market_validation.name: Harvey
market_validation.what: AI legal agents for law firms
market_validation.note: Vertical AI — legal domain. Proves domain-specific agents win.

trends.signal: Test-time compute scaling remains the defining technique. DiffCoT (ACL 2026) applies diffusion-style iterative refinement. Thinking-optimal scaling finds the sweet spot. Long CoT survey maps the reasoning era. UniT brings test-time scaling to multimodal models. SoftCoT++ operates in continuous token space for greater efficiency.
trends.learn: Chain-of-thought variants (DiffCoT, SoftCoT, Forest-of-Thought), test-time compute budget allocation, long chain-of-thought architectures, multimodal test-time scaling
trends.build: Reasoning-as-a-service APIs with configurable budgets. Domain-specific reasoning models. Verifier-as-a-service. Adaptive compute-budget middleware for multimodal tasks.

papers.title: DiffCoT: Diffusion-styled Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in LLMs (ACL 2026)
Towards Reasoning Era: Survey of Long Chain-of-Thought for Reasoning LLMs
Towards Thinking-Optimal Scaling of Test-Time Compute for LLM Reasoning
UniT: Unified Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Test-time Scaling

market_validation.name: Sierra
market_validation.note: Founded by ex-Salesforce CEO Bret Taylor. Reasoning-powered customer service. $150M ARR.

trends.signal: MCP security has become the #1 research focus after April 2026 frontier model escape. New 2026 papers: MCP-DPT defense taxonomy (Apr 2026), SMCP secure protocol variant (Feb 2026), formal security analysis of MCP spec (Jan 2026), and comparative threat modeling across MCP/A2A/Agora/ANP. Protocol ecosystem maturing rapidly.
trends.learn: MCP/A2A/ANP protocol designs and security models, defense-in-depth for agent protocols, secure tool discovery and invocation, zero-trust agent architectures
trends.build: Agent security and guardrail platforms (post-April 2026 demand surge). Protocol-level security middleware. Tool registry with security vetting. MCP server hardening and auditing tools.

papers.title: MCP-DPT: Defense-Placement Taxonomy and Coverage Analysis for MCP Security
SMCP: Secure Model Context Protocol
Breaking the Protocol: Security Analysis of MCP Specification and Prompt Injection
Security Threat Modeling for AI-Agent Protocols: MCP, A2A, Agora, ANP

market_validation.name: LangChain
market_validation.note: 97K GitHub stars. 50K+ production apps. LangSmith observability platform.

market_validation.name: Composio
market_validation.note: SOC2/ISO certified. 900+ enterprise integrations. Customers: Glean, Zoom, HubSpot.

trends.signal: SLMs now have dedicated quantization benchmarks (SLMQuant, Nov 2025). Task-specific analysis confirms SLMs outperform LLMs on focused domains. 1-bit quantization (BitRL) enables RL agents on edge. MobileQuant optimizes for mobile deployment. Lightweight transformer architectures surveyed for real-time edge apps.
trends.learn: Model compression (SLMQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF), 1-bit quantization, knowledge distillation, speculative decoding, edge deployment (MobileQuant, TensorSLM, CoreML, ONNX)
trends.build: On-device AI SDKs. SLM fine-tuning platforms. Edge inference optimization. Domain-specific tiny models for IoT/sensors/phones.

papers.title: SLMQuant: Benchmarking Small Language Model Quantization for Deployment
Task-Specific Efficiency: When Small Language Models Outperform LLMs
BitRL: Reinforcement Learning with 1-bit Quantized LMs for Edge
Lightweight Transformer Architectures for Edge Devices in Real-Time Apps

market_validation.name: Groq
market_validation.note: SLM inference enabler. LPU architecture for fast token generation.

market_validation.name: LM Studio
market_validation.note: Consumer-grade local SLM runner. Millions of downloads.

trends.signal: SE 3.0 research intensifies. SWE-bench Goes Live (continuous evaluation, not static). SWE-Bench++ generates scalable benchmarks from open-source repos. Repository-level Rust issue resolution (ICSE 2026). 'When Code Becomes Abundant' redefines SE around orchestration and verification. SWE-Shepherd advances process reward models for code agents.
trends.learn: Code LLM architectures, repo-level understanding, process reward models for code (SWE-Shepherd), SWE-bench evaluation methodology, agent-computer interfaces (ACI)
trends.build: Vertical coding agents (security audit, refactoring, migration). Codebase knowledge graphs. AI-native IDEs. Automated CI/CD agents and PR review systems.

papers.title: SWE-bench Goes Live! Continuous Evaluation for Code Agents
SWE-Bench++: Scalable Generation of SE Benchmarks from Open-Source Repos
Evaluating Automated Repository-Level Rust Issue Resolution with LLM Agents (ICSE 2026)
When Code Becomes Abundant: Redefining SE Around Orchestration and Verification

market_validation.name: Anysphere (Cursor)
market_validation.note: Founded 2022. SpaceX acquisition talks. $2B revenue run rate.

trends.signal: Embodied AI survey published (comprehensive). Omnidirectional/360° vision in embodied AI surveyed (PANORAMA). Hierarchical pre-training connects vision encoders with LLMs. Safety in embodied AI introduces risk taxonomy for physical-world agents. Tactile+vision+language fusion advancing.
trends.learn: Vision transformers, cross-modal attention, video-language models, tactile+vision fusion, VLM for spatial/3D reasoning, omnidirectional vision for robotics
trends.build: Video understanding APIs. Multimodal search. AR/VR AI assistants. Embodied AI for manufacturing/warehouse. Safety-first embodied agent frameworks.

papers.title: Aligning Cyber Space with Physical World: Comprehensive Survey on Embodied AI
PANORAMA: The Rise of Omnidirectional Vision in the Embodied AI Era
Safety in Embodied AI: A Survey of Risks, Attacks, and Defenses
Hierarchical Pre-Training of Vision Encoders with Large Language Models

market_validation.name: ElevenLabs
market_validation.note: Dominant in voice AI. Speech-to-speech and dubbing at scale.

startup_thesis.wave_1_2023_2025: Foundation models and chatbots — captured by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta
startup_thesis.wave_2_2025_now: Agentic AI + vertical applications + infrastructure. MCP ecosystem growing 97M downloads/month. Security is the #1 gap — after April 2026 frontier model escape, agent containment is mandatory.
startup_thesis.wave_3_2026_2028: Physical AI + agent economies + on-device intelligence. Regulatory landscape defined by containment requirements. Embodied AI safety becomes critical.
startup_thesis.where_to_play: The biggest gap is agent security and trust infrastructure — after April 2026's frontier model escape, every enterprise deploying agents needs containment, auditing, and zero-trust architectures (MCP-DPT, SMCP are the early signals). Second: vertical agents for regulated industries (legal, healthcare, finance). Third: on-device SLM deployment tooling as models shrink below 1B parameters.

market_summary: 15+ emerging startups (all founded 2022+, funded 2024-2026). Key updates: Sierra at $10B/$150M ARR (up from $4B+), Decagon Series D at $4.5B, Runway at $5.3B/$300M revenue, Suno $300M ARR. Pattern: vertical agents (legal, healthcare, service) + horizontal infra (frameworks, protocols, security) + creative tools (video, music, voice).
